evidence.snippet:
Servo Motor Solutions
Motor Control Drivers
---------------------
[Motor Controllers](/products/motor-controllers/)

Micro Rayon Motor Controller
----------------------------
Ultra-compact design with advanced motor control capabilities for small form factors

Servo Motor Drivers
Efficient. Powerful. Control at Your Fingertips.
Innovated for efficiency and adaptability, our motor drivers ensure smooth operation and maximum performance, even in the most demanding environments.
Our precision-engineered servo motor drivers deliver exceptional control with minimal power consumption, perfect for applications where accuracy and reliability are paramount.
[EXPLORE CAPABILITIES](/products/motor-controllers/)

items.notes: Motor controllers/servo motor drivers (Micro Rayon, TMC III, Rayon 70, Rayon 135, Rayon Single Board, EV Rider 200) explicitly marketed for UAV/drone applications.

evidence.snippet:
Built for Mission-Critical Performance
Power Distribution Units
Reliable. Flexible. Ready for Any Challenge.
Engineered for durability and precision, our PDUs ensure efficient, customizable power solutions in even the toughest environments.
Our military-grade power distribution units deliver unparalleled reliability with advanced protection features, compact design, and seamless integration capabilities.
[EXPLORE OUR SOLUTIONS](/products/power-distribution-units/)

Power Rider 16 Channel PDU
--------------------------
High-performance, multi-channel circuit breaker with advanced monitoring capabilities
![Power Rider 16 Channel PDU](/images/products-wo-background-compressed/power-rider-16-ch.png)
The Power Rider 16CH is a high-performance, multi-channel circuit breaker designed to deliver robust protection and control across 16 independently configurable channels. With seamless communication options and advanced monitoring capabilities, it ensures efficient power management for diverse applications.

items.notes: Power Distribution Units (Power Rider 16/12 channel) and Smart Circuit Breakers — military-grade power management products.

headquarters.notes: LinkedIn URL uses il.linkedin.com (Israeli subdomain); partners include IAI, Elbit, Rafael, IDF and Hebrew text for Israeli Ministry of Defense. City/address not disclosed in fetched pages; contact and about pages were skipped.

evidence.snippet: We design, develop, and deliver advanced motion and power control solutions, trusted by military and industrial leaders worldwide. From motor drivers to smart circuit breakers and custom-built systems, our technology ensures peak performance in the most demanding environments, including cutting-edge Combat Vehicles, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) platforms, AGVs and more.

![UAS icon](/redler-icon-pack-png/solidUAS.png)
UAS
Unmanned Aerial Vehicles requiring lightweight, reliable power and control systems
![Drone icon](/redler-icon-pack-png/solidDRONE.png)
Drone
Commercial and military drones with precision flight control requirements

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells motor controllers and PDUs as components used in drones, UAVs, AGVs, military vehicles. Does not manufacture complete platforms.

evidence.snippet:
Dimensions & Weight
30.4 mm x 25 mm x 9.6 mm, 10 g

Channels
16 configurable channels, each with up to 25A capacity (50A with parallel operation)
Voltage
Operating voltage range: 9-48 VDC
Current Capacity
Total unit current capacity up to 240A

readiness.notes: Named SKUs with full technical specifications and dimensional/weight data. Partners include major defense primes (Elbit, IAI, Rafael, General Dynamics, Textron). Technical documents listed as 'currently being prepared' but products appear production-ready.

tagline: Israeli component supplier of DC servo motor controllers (Micro Rayon through Rayon 135 series) and solid-state power distribution units and smart circuit breakers (Power Rider line), serving aerospace, defense, and robotics sectors. Partners include General Dynamics, Elbit, Leonardo, and US Army. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of actual US program integration is sparse despite partner roster.
